name: route-engine-js
description: A lightweight Visual Novel engine built in JavaScript for creating interactive narrative games with branching storylines

scripts.vt:generate: bun run esbuild.js && rtgl vt generate
scripts.vt:docker: bun run esbuild.js && docker run --rm ${VT_DOCKER_ARGS:-} --user $(id -u):$(id -g) -e RTGL_VT_DEBUG=true -v "$PWD:/app" -w /app docker.io/han4wluc/rtgl:playwright-v1.57.0-rtgl-v1.0.10 rtgl vt screenshot --wait-event vt:ready --concurrency ${VT_DOCKER_CONCURRENCY:-2} --timeout ${VT_DOCKER_TIMEOUT:-60000}
scripts.vt:report: bun run vt:docker && rtgl vt report --diff-threshold ${VT_REPORT_DIFF_THRESHOLD:-0.8}
